Theme Guide 2026

11 → 15 August  ·  Budapest  ·  The Island of Freedom

Day 1 · Tuesday 11th August
Midnight Sun 🌅
🌈
Vibe: tropical glam meets Y2K fever dream
🎨
Colours: coral, tangerine, hot pink, gold, turquoise
⚡
Energy: you ARE the sun and you are NOT coming down, even at midnight 🕺

Florals. Sequins. Body gems. Hawaiian prints. Sheer layers. Spray graffiti. Golden hour.

If you don't look like you belong in a Zara Larsson music video on a yacht in Ibiza, go back and try again.

Guys: linen, tropical shirts, orange/pink/white. A grey t-shirt is not a personality 👀
🎵 If this theme was a song: Zara Larsson — "Midnight Sun". Obvs.
Day 2 · Wednesday 12th August
Pocketful of Sunshine ☀️
🌻
Vibe: The sun is a star and so are you baby! Check your pockets for bags and SUNSHINE ✨
🎨
Colours: butter yellow, lemon yellow 🍋, pastel yellow, bright white
⚡
Energy: Dopamine dressing to the max. If you're happy and you know it shake your ass 🍑 You're HOT HORNY AND HAPPY so act like it!

Shine so bright that even Hellen Keller needs to look away. If we don't need sunglasses when we look at you, then we don't need you 😎

Gals guide: Stay bright baby with yellow and more yellow. Think gold accessories, sunflowers and lemon prints, and swirling sun temp-tattoos. Get creative with streamers and tinsel for your rays and a pocket full of gold glitter won't go astray.
Guy guide: bright and white, big brim hats, lots of pockets, light white linen, sunflower stems, butter yellow shirts, lemon drop dressing.
🎵 If this theme was a song: Natasha Bedingfield — "Pocket Full of Sunshine". Duh!
Day 3 · Thursday 13th August
Szigetchella 🤠
🤠
Vibe: Free people, free love, free the nipple even. From the deserts of LA to the island of the freedom, Szigetchella is here!
🌈
Colours: You are free to explore the colour wheel as you feel.
💊
Energy: Put a spell 🪄 on fellow festival goers with your witchy free loving vibe. Or round up the potatoes 🥔 with your Americana cowboy aesthetic.

Embrace the freedom of the OG festivals like Coachella and Woodstock and bring the love for this free day theme.

We're making country cunt and boho bougie. Where festival core meets desert nights to match how dusty you'll feel. But if you don't participate, you might just get left in the dirt…

Gals guide: flowy dresses and sheer shrugs, layered accessories, crotchet sets, hair scarves, flower crowns, cowboy boots, witchy pieces, statement belts, lace details.
Guy guide: big buckle belts, cowboy hat, bandanas, crotchet shirts, light denim shorts/pants, white singlets, boots and western accessories.
🎵 If this theme was a song: Florence and the Machine — "You've Got the Love". Peace ✌️
Day 4 · Friday 14th August
It's Not a Phase, Mom 🖤
🎸
Vibe: Dust off the converse, deep comb that part and relive your alt/emo teen dreams! It was never a phase, mom, it's a lifestyle.
🎨
Colours: Welcome to the Black Parade
💊
Energy: Make this a day to remember and channel your inner angst into an absolute rager.

If your chemical romance is over and you're feeling at an all time low, this day is for you.

We've already brought you the horizon with all of our sunny themes. But no need to panic at the disco, because this simple plan for outfits can be as dark as your thoughts on day 4.

Rise against the urge to stray from the theme, dress to depress and remember, cute is what we aim for. Failure to meet the theme may result in a fall out, boy.

Gals and guys guide: band shirts, black and dark grey pieces, leather, stud accessories, eyeliner, side parts, fishnets, black boots/converse/vans.
🎵 If this theme was a song: Bring Me the Horizon — "Can You Feel My Heart" 🖤
Day 5 · Saturday 15th August
Cosmic Love 🛸
👽
Vibe: Day Five is our send-off to the universe and we are going OUT OF THIS WORLD. Silver, holographic, iridescent, metallic — if you don't look like you just landed from another galaxy, then Houston we have a problem. This is the final frontier. The closing ceremony. The last transmission before we all return to our home planets.
🌈
Colours: Silver, chrome, holographic, iridescent, electric blue, cosmic purple. If it catches light, wear it. If it blinds someone, perfect.
⚡
Energy: Full space cadet. Out of this world. Absolutely launched into orbit. We don't know what you took to get here but the aliens called and they want their mates back.

This is Day Five. We've been sunny, we've been angsty, we've been free. Now we ascend. Shine so hard that NASA picks you up on radar. And if it doesn't maybe you're not high enough.

Gals guide: metallic co-ords, holographic skirts, silver boots, iridescent bodysuits, chrome accessories, face gems and glitter EVERYWHERE, alien eye makeup, space buns.
Guy guide: silver joggers, metallic shirts, chrome accessories, reflective sunglasses, holographic details.
🎵 If this theme was a song: Skrillex — "Bangarang" 🛸
See you on the island 🏝️
Yours Truly, Your Sziget Fairy Godmothers 🧚
